tasks.subject: Task 1: DB schema & migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Permissions tables, enums, indexes; pnpm db:generate produces a clean migration.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/permissions/grants.ts","apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/permissions/requests.ts","apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/permissions/relations.ts","apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/permissions/index.ts","apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps/server && pnpm db:generate && pnpm db:migrate","acceptanceCriteria":["Schema files compile","Migration applies cleanly","Both tables and 3 enums exist"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: SpellIdService + BIP-39 word list
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Generate memorable 3-4 word spell ids backed by BIP-39 wordlist.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/permissions/spell-words.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/permissions/spell-id.service.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/permissions/__tests__/spell-id.service.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps/server && pnpm jest apps/gateway/src/permissions/__tests__/spell-id.service.spec.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["SPELL_WORDS length=2048","generate() returns 3-4 word lowercase string","parse() normalizes whitespace and case","deterministic via injected RNG"]}
```


tasks.subject: Task 11: Enforcement — bot cross-channel messages:send
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace plain ForbiddenException at messages.controller:85 with permission gate; on deny, file request and return 403 PERMISSION_REQUIRED with spell id.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/messages.controller.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/messages/messages.module.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/bots/bots.service.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/permissions/__tests__/messages.gate-integration.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps/server && pnpm jest apps/gateway/src/permissions/__tests__/messages.gate-integration.spec.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["non-bot 403 unchanged","bot deny -> PERMISSION_REQUIRED + spell id","bot allow -> 201 message created"]}
```
